schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi — ₹6,000/year direct income support to all eligible farmer families in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each.
schemes.eligibility: All small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar card, Bank account linked to Aadhaar, Land records (Khasra-Khatauni)

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Comprehensive crop insurance covering losses from natural calamities, pests and diseases. Premium as low as 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops.
schemes.grant: Full crop loss coverage based on assessment
schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
schemes.requirements: Land records, Bank account, Crop sowing certificate, Aadhaar

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Short-term credit for agricultural needs at subsidized interest rate of 4% per annum. Covers crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and allied activities.
schemes.grant: Up to ₹3 Lakh at 4% interest per annum
schemes.eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers, SHG members
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar, PAN card, Land documents or lease agreement, Passport photo

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM Yojana
schemes.description: Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan — 60% government subsidy on solar pumps for irrigation. Reduces electricity costs and promotes clean energy.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers with irrigated land holdings
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar, Land records, Electricity connection details, Bank account

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Free soil health cards providing crop-wise nutrient recommendations. Helps farmers optimize fertilizer use and improve soil fertility.
schemes.grant: Free soil testing + personalized crop recommendations
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar card, Land details, Mobile number

schemes.name: TN Chief Minister's Farmer Relief
schemes.description: Tamil Nadu government direct income support to registered farmers. Additional support during drought and natural calamity periods.
schemes.eligibility: Tamil Nadu farmers registered in e-District portal with land records
schemes.requirements: TN ration card, Aadhaar, Patta/land records, Bank account, Farmer ID

schemes.name: e-NAM Market Platform
schemes.description: National Agriculture Market — online trading platform connecting farmers directly with buyers across India. Eliminates middlemen and ensures better prices.
schemes.grant: Free market access, better price discovery
schemes.eligibility: All farmers with produce to sell
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar, Bank account, Mobile number, Produce quality certificate

schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Agricultural development scheme for farm mechanization, storage infrastructure, and irrigation. Provides grants for individual farmers and farmer groups.
schemes.grant: Up to ₹25 Lakh for infrastructure development
schemes.eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, cooperatives, and farmer groups
schemes.requirements: Group registration, Detailed project proposal, Land documents, Bank account

schemes.name: NABARD Agricultural Loan
schemes.description: Long-term investment credit for land development, irrigation, farm mechanization, and allied agricultural activities at subsidized rates.
schemes.grant: Up to ₹10 Lakh at subsidized interest rates
schemes.eligibility: Farmers with clear land ownership documents
schemes.requirements: Aadhaar, Land records, Income certificate, Bank account, Credit history

schemes.name: Drought Prone Area Programme
schemes.description: Watershed development and water conservation grants for drought-prone regions. Focuses on soil moisture conservation and groundwater recharge.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in officially declared drought-prone districts
schemes.requirements: Land records, District drought certification, Bank account, Aadhaar

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
schemes.description: Interest subvention scheme for post-harvest management infrastructure including cold storage, warehouses, and primary processing units.
schemes.grant: Loans up to ₹2 Crore at 3% interest subvention
schemes.requirements: Detailed business plan, Land documents, Bank account, Project feasibility report

schemes.name: TN Horticulture Development Scheme
schemes.description: Tamil Nadu government subsidy for vegetable, fruit, and flower crop cultivation. Covers seeds, planting material, drip irrigation, and packaging.
schemes.grant: 50% subsidy on seeds, inputs, and drip irrigation
schemes.eligibility: Tamil Nadu farmers growing notified horticulture crops
schemes.requirements: TN Farmer ID, Patta/land records, Crop declaration, Bank account

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach. Provides certification support, training, and ₹50,000 per hectare financial assistance.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic practices for minimum 3 years
schemes.requirements: Group of 50+ farmers, Aadhaar, Land records, Commitment to organic practices

schemes.name: Weather Based Crop Insurance
schemes.description: Insurance based on weather parameters (temperature, rainfall, humidity) rather than crop yield. Faster claim settlement using automatic weather stations.
schemes.grant: Compensation based on weather deviation from normal
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in notified areas with loanee and non-loanee farmers
schemes.requirements: Crop loan account or voluntary enrollment, Land records, Aadhaar

schemes.name: Per Drop More Crop (PDMC)
schemes.description: Subsidy for micro-irrigation systems including drip and sprinkler irrigation. Promotes water use efficiency and reduces irrigation costs by 40-50%.
schemes.grant: 55% subsidy for small farmers, 45% for others
schemes.eligibility: All farmers with water source and suitable land
schemes.requirements: Land records, Water source proof, Bank account, Aadhaar, Soil report
